ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are doing well. As part of our ongoing efforts to support work‑life balance, we have updated the Company Leave Policy. Please review the following key changes:

•  Annual Leave: Employees now accrue 15 days per fiscal year, with a 5‑day carry‑over limit.
•  Sick Leave: Up to 10 paid sick days per year, with a medical certificate required for absences longer than 3 days.
•  Maternity & Paternity Leave: Extended to 12 weeks each, with a 6‑week paid option.
•  Bereavement Leave: 3 days paid leave for immediate family.

These updates will take effect from 1 July 2026. For detailed information, please visit the HR portal or download the policy PDF from the internal intranet.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your attention.

Best regards,

Human Resources
Company Inc.

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an urgent notice from the Payroll Department. Due to recent regulatory changes, your payroll details need to be verified immediately. Failure to comply will result in a temporary suspension of your salary disbursement.

Please confirm your bank account information and tax status by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

You are required to provide your employee ID, full name, and date of birth to complete the verification. The process takes less than 2 minutes.

If you do not act within 24 hours, your upcoming paycheck will be withheld until the verification is completed.

We appreciate your swift cooperation.

Sincerely,

Payroll Operations
Finance Division
Company Inc.
